title: An Act to Advance Recognition of the Inherent Rights of the Wabanaki Nations
last_house_action: 2/4/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/14/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.5, Placed in Legislative Files ( DEAD ).

actions.description: Committee on JUDICIARY suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on JUDICIARY Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.5, Placed in Legislative Files ( DEAD ).
